techcrunch.summary: Notion's head of product said he was "astonished" at “the amount of people RT-ing this."

techcrunch.summary: "Chat is dead" — at least, according to a senior OpenAI employee.

techcrunch.title: OpenAI unveils Lockdown Mode to protect sensitive data from prompt injection attacks
techcrunch.summary: Even with Lockdown Mode, ChatGPT could be still vulnerable to prompt injections, but the goal is to reduce the likelihood that sensitive data gets shared in the process.

techcrunch.title: Sriram Krishnan is leaving his role as White House AI advisor
techcrunch.summary: Krishnan is reportedly starting a new institution to continue shaping Trump's AI policy.

techcrunch.title: The Trump administration might take an equity stake in OpenAI
techcrunch.summary: President Donald Trump said he's discussing deals "where the American people can benefit from the success of AI."

techcrunch.title: Startup Battlefield 200 applications officially close in 3 days
techcrunch.summary: Applications for Startup Battlefield 200 officially close on June 8, 11:59 p.m. PT. Don't wait any longer. Secure your shot at competing on the Disrupt Stage at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 this October at San Francisco's Moscone West.

techcrunch.title: Google will pay SpaceX $920M per month for compute
techcrunch.summary: In a statement, a Google representative described the deal as a result of unexpected demand for its recently launched AI products.
